author: Muhammad Ali
text: Don't count the days, make the days count.

author: Muhammad Ali
text: It isn't the mountains ahead to climb that wear you out; it's the pebble in your shoe.

author: Muhammad Ali
text: He who is not courageous enough to take risks will accomplish nothing in life.

author: Muhammad Ali
text: A man who has no imagination has no wings.

author: Muhammad Ali
text: Service to others is the rent you pay for your room here on earth.

author: Malcolm X
text: The future belongs to those who prepare for it today.

author: Malcolm X
text: Education is the passport to the future.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: A focused fool can accomplish more than a distracted genius.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: Volume negates luck.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: Money chases value. Provide more value.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: The market doesn't pay you for effort. It pays you for outcomes.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: Every skill you want is on the other side of reps.

author: Alex Hormozi
text: You don't need more goals. You need more execution.

author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
text: The good thing about science is that it's true whether or not you believe in it.

author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
text: The universe is under no obligation to make sense to you.

author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
text: Where ignorance lurks, so too do the frontiers of discovery and imagination.

author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
text: We are stardust brought to life, then empowered by the universe to figure itself out—and we have only just begun.

author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
text: Science is something to be proud of; it allows us to understand the world in spite of ourselves.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: We do not grow larger by making others smaller.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: To stand for something is to stand against something.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Be gasoline, not a roadblock.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Get to work positively impacting those within your reach.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: When knowledge becomes air, you will open your eyes and everything you have ever wanted will be there.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: A trillion beautiful words do not add up to one deed.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Men should be of few words and many actions.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Always speak last, never interrupting anyone's speech. Do not cut anyone off.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Always first consider what the other person is seeking and thinking before you engage or act.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Be around people who are stacking their chips. If they're stacking their chips, they don't need your chips.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Don't just look the part, live the part.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Beauty goes. Money grows.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: Many have asked me how to be a great speaker. Few have asked how to be a great listener.

author: Marquett Davon Burton
text: We grow a better society when we plant the right seeds in the youth.

author: Frederick Douglass
text: If there is no struggle, there is no progress.

author: Frederick Douglass
text: Power concedes nothing without a demand. It never did and it never will.

author: Martin Luther King Jr.
text: Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.

author: Martin Luther King Jr.
text: Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter.

author: Maya Angelou
text: Nothing can dim the light that shines from within.

author: Maya Angelou
text: Try to be a rainbow in someone's cloud.

author: Kobe Bryant
text: If you're afraid to fail, then you're probably going to fail.

author: Kobe Bryant
text: The most important thing is to try and inspire people so that they can be great in whatever they want to do.

author: Jocko Willink
text: Discipline equals freedom.

author: Jocko Willink
text: Stop making excuses. Take action. Own your decisions. Execute.

author: Marcus Aurelius
text: You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.

author: Marcus Aurelius
text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.

author: Viktor E. Frankl
text: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.

author: Bruce Lee
text: Absorb what is useful, discard what is useless, and add what is specifically your own.

author: Mae Jemison
text: Never be limited by other people's limited imaginations.

author: Katherine Johnson
text: Everything is physics and math.

author: Katherine Johnson
text: I counted everything. Anything that could be counted, I did.

author: Booker T. Washington
text: Success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has overcome.

author: Booker T. Washington
text: Character, not circumstances, makes the man.

author: Marcus Garvey
text: A people without the knowledge of their past history, origin and culture is like a tree without roots.

author: Marcus Garvey
text: With confidence, you have won before you have started.

author: Harriet Tubman
text: Every great dream begins with a dreamer. Always remember, you have within you the strength, the patience, and the passion to reach for the stars to change the world.

author: Harriet Tubman
text: I freed a thousand slaves. I could have freed a thousand more if only they knew they were slaves.

author: Epictetus
text: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.

author: Epictetus
text: No man is free who is not master of himself.

author: Plato
text: The measure of a man is what he does with power.

author: Socrates
text: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy not on fighting the old, but on building the new.

author: Alexander the Great
text: There is nothing impossible to him who will try.

author: David Goggins
text: You are in danger of living a life so comfortable and soft that you will die without ever realizing your true potential.

author: David Goggins
text: Suffering is the true test of life.

author: Nipsey Hussle
text: The marathon continues.

author: Nipsey Hussle
text: Most people want to skip the process, not knowing that when they skip the process, they skip the results.

author: Naval Ravikant
text: Play long-term games with long-term people.

author: Naval Ravikant
text: Earn with your mind, not your time.

author: Elon Musk
text: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.

author: Henry Ford
text: Whether you think you can, or you think you can't—you're right.

author: Andrew Carnegie
text: The man who acquires the ability to take full possession of his own mind may take possession of anything else he wants.

author: Mike Tyson
text: Discipline is doing what you hate to do, but doing it like you love it.

author: Thomas Sowell
text: It takes considerable knowledge just to realize the extent of your own ignorance.

author: Frederick Douglass
text: Once you learn to read, you will be forever free.

author: Malcolm X
text: Stumbling is not falling.

author: Kobe Bryant
text: Everything negative—pressure, challenges—is all an opportunity for me to rise.
